prompt: I have a modal dialog and a tooltip in my UI. They both use the same box shadow. What shadow values should I use for each, and why should they be different?
assertions: Explains that shadow size/softness communicates elevation — closer elements have larger, softer shadows
Justifies why the modal should have a larger/heavier shadow than the tooltip based on elevation
Includes specific CSS box-shadow values or examples for at least one element
Recommends building a reusable shadow scale/system rather than ad-hoc values
